{{Quote|Prior to his disappearance ten years ago, Master Dooku was known to have a passion for antiquities and exotic forms of technology. His presence there may have been something as innocuous as a shopping trip for curios.|Bashinan Hodizwen|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Bashinan Hodizwen''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Bashinan Hodizwen was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Pursuing the teachings of the [[Jedi Consular]] during independent study as a Knight, Hodizwen became a noted [[Lore Keeper]], and was considered a scholar by many within the Order.<ref name="HNN" />

During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], conflicting reports emerged regarding the identity of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' leader, the mysterious [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] of [[Serenno/Legends|Serenno]]. While the High Council remained tight-lipped on the subject, reporters from the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] network were able to interview Hodizwen, who gave brief insight into former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] Dooku's personal interests. Citing Dooku's fascination with antiquities from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as reason for Dooku's appearance in the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]], Hodizwen did not comment further on the Count's sudden return from self-imposed exile.<ref name="HNN" />
